scripts.dist: npm run web:build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run web:build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac -c.directories.output=mac-installer --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run web:build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win -c.directories.output=windows-installer --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run web:build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux -c.directories.output=linux-installer --publish never
